recommendations.title: Lola Montès
recommendations.overview: Lola Montes, previously a great adventuress, is reduced to being the attraction of a circus after having been the lover of various important men.

recommendations.title: The Reckless Moment
recommendations.overview: After discovering the dead body of her teenage daughter's lover, a housewife takes desperate measures to protect her family from scandal.

recommendations.title: La Ronde

recommendations.title: Le Plaisir
recommendations.overview: Three stories about the pleasure. The first one is about a man hiding his age behind a mask to keep going to balls and fancying women - pleasure and youth. Then comes the long tale of Mme Tellier taking her girls (whores) to the country for attending

recommendations.title: The Earrings of Madame de...
recommendations.overview: In late 19th century France, the Countess Louise, wife of a wealthy general, sells the earrings her husband gave her on their wedding day to pay off her secret debts, then claims to have lost them. Her husband quickly learns of the deceit, which is t

recommendations.title: For Sama
recommendations.overview: A love letter from a young mother to her daughter, the film tells the story of Waad al-Kateab’s life through five years of the uprising in Aleppo, Syria as she falls in love, gets married and gives birth to Sama, all while cataclysmic conflict rises

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Eternity and a Day
recommendations.overview: Famous writer Alexander contracts a terminal illness. He receives a letter from his wife describing a summer day 30 years ago, and leaves his seaside home to remember his past. This journey will allow him to wander between the past and the present, a

recommendations.title: Close Range Love
recommendations.overview: A smart high school student falls in love with her English teacher after she receives one-on-one tutoring from him.

recommendations.title: Beyond the Universe
recommendations.overview: While waiting for a kidney transplant, a young pianist finds an unexpected connection with her doctor — and the courage to fulfill her musical dreams.
